items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate personalization variables is not satisfied as there is no concrete evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms that implement these variables. While the linked use case mentions the need for personalization variables, it does not provide specific details on how these are implemented or validated through API reads or persisted state checks. Therefore, the evidence does not confirm requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
